english translation text: Apne roze pe humko bulalijiye, Ya imam-e razaO Imam Raza! Please call us to your shrineEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Apne roze pe humko bulalijiye, Ya imam-e razaYu mera darde dilki dawa dijiye, Ya imam-e raza
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Imam Raza, Please call us to your shrine
O Imam Raza, Please give me a cure for the pain in my heart

Please give me the permission to enter your holy shrine
May I see the light of the Haram (shrine) with my eyes

urdu transliteration text:
Mera aka ye hai zindagi mukhtasarKhatme hone ki hai zindagi ka safarMuj ghunegar ko baksha wa dijiye, Ya imam-e raza
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Oh my Imam, this life is very short
This journey of life will come to an end very soon
Please help me to be forgiven by Allah

urdu transliteration text:
Shahe laulaap ka wastaa apkoPanjatan paak ka wasta apkoJo hai bimar unko shafaa dijiye, Ya imam-e raza
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I ask you in the name of Rasulallah  (saw)
I ask you in the name of the Ahulbayt (a.s)
Please cure all those who are ill
